refusal.description: 拒绝内容对数概率列表

prompt.description: Text prompt that describes the video to generate
prompt.example: A calico cat playing a piano on stage

model.description: The video generation model to use

size.description: Output resolution formatted as width x height

id.description: Unique identifier for the video job

object.description: The object type, which is always 'video'

model.description: The video generation model that produced the job

status.description: Current lifecycle status of the video job

progress.description: Approximate completion percentage for the generation task

prompt.description: The prompt that was used to generate the video
prompt.example: A calico cat playing a piano on stage

seconds.description: Duration of the generated clip in seconds

size.description: The resolution of the generated video

error.description: Error payload that explains why generation failed, if applicable

created_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for when the job was created

completed_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for when the job completed, if finished

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) for when the downloadable assets expire, if set

output_url.description: The URL to download the generated video

remixed_from_video_id.description: Identifier of the source video if this video is a remix

message.example: Video generation failed due to content policy violation

status.description: 状态: queued, in_progress, requires_action, cancelling, cancelled, failed, completed, expired

content.description: Message content, supports string or structured content blocks

error.description: 错误信息（如果生成失败）

hate.description: Content that expresses, incites, or promotes hate based on protected characteristics

sexual.description: Content meant to arouse sexual excitement

violence.description: Content that depicts death, violence, or physical injury

hate/threatening.description: Hateful content that also includes violence or serious harm

self-harm.description: Content that promotes, encourages, or depicts acts of self-harm

violence/graphic.description: Violent content that depicts death, violence, or serious physical injury

illegal-act.description: Content that promotes or encourages illegal acts

illegal-act/instruction.description: Content that provides instructions on how to make or use illegal items

id.description: The unique identifier for the moderation request

model.description: The model used to generate the moderation results

ModerationResult.description: Moderation result for a single input

flagged.description: Whether the content violates OpenAI's usage policies

categories.description: A list of the categories, and whether they are flagged or not

category_scores.description: A list of the categories along with their scores as predicted by model

object.description: The object type, which is always 'embedding'

index.description: The index of the embedding in the list of embeddings

object.description: The object type, which is always 'list'

model.description: The model used for generating embeddings

mode.description: 缓存类型: session 或 common_prefix
缓存类型: session 或 common_prefix

text.description: The text in the message content that needs to be replaced

id.description: Unique identifier for this audio response

transcript.example: Hello, how can I help you today?

expires_at.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) for when this audio response was created

stop.description: 停止生成的字符串列表，最多4个

toolChoice.description: 控制模型返回是否包含待调用的工具

top_p.description: 核采样概率阈值，取值范围[0, 1]

max_tokens.description: 模型回答最大长度（单位token）

max_completion_tokens.description: 控制模型输出的最大长度（包括思维链）

presence_penalty.description: 存在惩罚系数，取值范围[-2.0, 2.0]

frequency_penalty.description: 频率惩罚系数，取值范围[-2.0, 2.0]

parallel_tool_calls.description: 是否允许返回多个待调用的工具

logprobs.description: 是否返回输出tokens的对数概率

top_logprobs.description: 每个位置最可能返回的token数量，取值范围[0, 20]

role.description: The role of the author of this message

name.description: The name of the author of this message

refusal.description: The refusal message generated by the model

audio.description: If the audio output modality is requested, this object contains data about the audio response

tool_calls.description: The tool calls generated by the model

tool_call_id.description: Tool call that this message is responding to

fileId.description: The ID of the specific File the citation is from

quote.description: The specific quote in the file

include_usage.description: 是否在输出结束前返回token用量

chunk_include_usage.description: 是否在每个chunk中返回累计token用量

status.description: 状态: validating, in_progress, finalizing, completed, expired, cancelling, cancelled, failed

ChatCompletionDeleteResponse.description: OpenAI标准聊天完成删除响应
